name: omo-integration
description: Cross-reference map of meisijiya-skills to omo features (MCPs, agents, built-in skills, modes, categories)

positive_triggers.input: What omo features should I use from this skill?
positive_triggers.reason: User wants to know omo ↔ meisijiya-skills mapping

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'What omo MCP should source-driven-development use?'
expected_behavior: Agent references the MCP table → 'context7 (primary), grep_app (real-world), websearch (fallback)'
Agent updates source-driven-development skill to invoke context7 first

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'How do I do a serious security audit on production code?'
expected_behavior: Agent references modes table → 'security-research mode (3 hunters + 2 PoC engineers)'

notes: Meta-doc / cross-reference map. v0.1.0 — initial release as part of v0.2.0 (omo integration expansion).
